focus: Q2 sk-doc --type mapping for all authored docs + mandatory requirements per type + contract violations (ARCHITECTURE.md frontmatter, INSTALL_GUIDE.md missing Section 0/Core Principle)

finding: SKILL.md matches sk-doc 'skill' type (strict enforcement). Has frontmatter with name/description/allowed-tools/version. Has WHEN TO USE and SMART ROUTING sections. H2 format uses numbered ALL CAPS. Partial read confirms compliance with skill_creation.md:70-76 requirements.

README.md matches sk-doc 'readme' type (flexible enforcement). Has frontmatter with title/description/trigger_phrases. Has TABLE OF CONTENTS with QUICK START and USAGE EXAMPLES sections. H1 intro with purpose. Compliant with validation.md:270-274 requirements.

INSTALL_GUIDE.md matches sk-doc 'install_guide' type (moderate enforcement). Has frontmatter and TABLE OF CONTENTS. Missing Section 0 (AI-FIRST INSTALL GUIDE) from 11-section contract. Missing Core Principle blockquote in Section 1 (contract requirement per install_guide_creation.md:104-113). Has sections 1-6, 8-9 (section 7 optional, 8 missing).

ARCHITECTURE.md matches sk-doc 'knowledge' type (strict enforcement) but has frontmatter (lines 1-11). Knowledge type contract requires no frontmatter per validation.md:264-268. Has numbered H2 sections (METADATA, OVERVIEW, COMPONENTS). H2 format uses numbered ALL CAPS. Frontmatter presence is a contract violation.

feature_catalog/feature_catalog.md matches sk-doc 'feature_catalog' type (moderate enforcement). Has frontmatter with title/description/trigger_phrases/importance_tier. Has unnumbered TABLE OF CONTENTS. Has '## 1. OVERVIEW' section. Category sections with short summaries and explicit links. Compliant with feature_catalog_creation.md:78-100 requirements.

manual_testing_playbook/manual_testing_playbook.md matches sk-doc 'manual_testing_playbook' type (moderate enforcement). Has frontmatter with title/description/trigger_phrases/importance_tier. Has TABLE OF CONTENTS. Has '## 1. OVERVIEW' section. Has required global sections (GLOBAL PRECONDITIONS, GLOBAL EVIDENCE REQUIREMENTS, REVIEW PROTOCOL). Category sections with per-feature summaries. Compliant with manual_testing_playbook_creation.md:82-97 requirements.

Per-feature file matches sk-doc 'feature_catalog_entry' type. Has frontmatter with title/description/trigger_phrases/importance_tier. Has '## 1. OVERVIEW' and '## 2. CURRENT REALITY' sections. Compliant with feature_catalog_creation.md:106-119 requirements based on partial read.

Per-feature file matches sk-doc 'playbook_scenario' type. Has frontmatter with title/description/trigger_phrases/importance_tier. Has '## 1. OVERVIEW', '## 2. SCENARIO CONTRACT', '## 3. TEST EXECUTION' sections. Has realistic user request, operator prompt, expected signals, pass/fail criteria. Compliant with manual_testing_playbook_creation.md:111-129 requirements based on partial read.

answer: Mapped all authored docs to sk-doc types: SKILL.md (skill), README.md (readme), INSTALL_GUIDE.md (install_guide), ARCHITECTURE.md (knowledge), feature_catalog/feature_catalog.md (feature_catalog), manual_testing_playbook/manual_testing_playbook.md (manual_testing_playbook), per-feature files (feature_catalog_entry/playbook_scenario). Identified contract violations: ARCHITECTURE.md has frontmatter (knowledge type requires none), INSTALL_GUIDE.md missing Section 0 and Core Principle blockquote.
